untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Adam & Eve double top formation with two tops and valley decline of 10-20%) requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic that cannot be expressed as simple indicator crossovers. Specific requirements include: identifying two distinct peaks with small variation between them, measuring the valley decline percentage between peaks, and confirming price decline back to valley low. These multi-bar structural patterns are beyond the scope of single-bar indicator conditions.
translation_notes: The signal describes a chart pattern recognition task requiring identification of two tops with controlled spacing and a measured valley decline. While entry_short and exit_short contain placeholder conditions based on general double-top characteristics (higher highs, mean reversion), the core pattern logic cannot be properly translated without pattern detection capabilities. A proper implementation would require a dedicated pattern scanner or multi-bar lookback logic.
